summary: Iteration 29: Complete Dark Theme Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified dark theme consistency (#0A0F1E bg) across all pages (landing, login, register, student-login, admin, parent portal, student academy, donate). Semantic Vision logo (Eye icon + text) confirmed visible on all pages. Admin route protection working - non-admin users correctly redirected from /admin to /portal. Student SJ stats showing correctly (Vocabulary: 9, Score: 93.3, Reading: 23m).

Admin route protection works via allowedRoles=['admin'] in ProtectedRoute. Student SJ has mastered_tokens=9, agentic_reach_score=93.3, reading_time=23m. Brand CTA button visible on landing page. NarrativeReader uses warm reading color (#E8E0D0). Progress Tab shows non-zero values for SJ correctly.
